de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class MethodBodyStatement

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
      • recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
        • recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • recoder.java.statement.JavaStatement
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.MethodBodyStatement
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable, ExpressionContainer, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReferenceContainer, SourceElement, Statement, ModelElement, NamedModelElement

    public class MethodBodyStatement
extends JavaStatement
implements TypeReferenceContainer, ExpressionContainer, NamedProgramElement, ReferenceSuffix
    A shortcut-statement for a method body.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Detail

      • MethodBodyStatement

        public MethodBodyStatement(TypeReference bodySource,
                           Expression resultVar,
                           MethodReference methRef)
        Construct a method body shortcut
        Parameters:
        bodySource - exact class where the body is declared
        resultVar - the Expression naming the variable to which the result of the mthod is assigned
        methRef - MethodReference that represents the call

      • getChildAt

        public ProgramElement getChildAt(int index)
        Returns the child at the specified index in this node's "virtual" child array
        Specified by:

        Parameters:
        index - an index into this node's "virtual" child array
        Returns:
        the program element at the given position
        Throws:

        Returns:

        Return the type reference at the specified index in this node's "virtual" statement array.
        Specified by:
        getTypeReferenceAt in interface TypeReferenceContainer
        Parameters:
        index - an index for a type reference.
        Returns:
        the type reference with the given index.

        Returns:

      • getExpressionAt

        public Expression getExpressionAt(int index)
        Return the expression at the specified index in this node's "virtual" expression array.
        Specified by:
        getExpressionAt in interface ExpressionContainer
        Parameters:
        index - an index for a expression.
        Returns:
        the expression with the given index.
        Throws:
        java.lang.ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of bounds.

      • replaceChild

        public boolean replaceChild(ProgramElement p,
                            ProgramElement q)
        Replace a single child in the current node. The child to replace is matched by identity and hence must be known exactly. The replacement element can be null - in that case, the child is effectively removed. The parent role of the new child is validated, while the parent link of the replaced child is left untouched.
        Specified by:
        replaceChild in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
        Parameters:
        p - the old child.
        q - the new child.
        Returns:
        true if a replacement has occured, false otherwise.
        Throws:
        java.lang.ClassCastException - if the new child cannot take over the role of the old one.

      • makeParentRoleValid

        public void makeParentRoleValid()
        Ensures that each child has "this" as syntactical parent.
        Specified by:
        makeParentRoleValid in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
        Overrides:
        makeParentRoleValid in class JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
